title: Data Sources
description: Data Sources represent the database connections to OMOP CDM-formatted datasets available within your Parthenon environment. Administrators configure and manage data source connections, while researchers select appropriate sources when building cohorts, running analyses, and exploring patient data.
tips: Verify CDM version compatibility for each data source before running analyses to ensure all required tables and fields are present.
Use descriptive names and metadata tags for each data source to help researchers identify the most appropriate dataset for their study.
Review the Jobs Monitoring page after data uploads to confirm that ingestion completed without errors before initiating analyses.
Configure source-specific vocabulary mappings to align local coding systems with OMOP standard concepts.
Restrict data source access by role to ensure researchers can only query datasets covered by their data use agreements.
